entityTypes.name: Goblin
entityTypes.description: A sneaky little creature with sharp claws.

entityTypes.name: Skeleton Warrior
entityTypes.description: Animated bones wielding a rusty sword.

entityTypes.name: Dark Mage
entityTypes.description: A hooded figure crackling with dark energy.

entityTypes.name: Cave Slime
entityTypes.description: A gooey mass that absorbs impacts.

entityTypes.name: Dungeon Guardian
entityTypes.description: A massive armored figure guarding the dungeon exit.

npcs.name: Old Sage
npcs.greeting: Greetings, traveler. The dungeon holds many secrets...

dialogue.response: This dungeon shifts and changes. Each floor grows more dangerous. Seek the forge rooms to craft powerful spells.

dialogue.text: Can you teach me a spell?
dialogue.response: Here, take this rune. It channels the power of flame. Use it wisely at the forge.
Take this healing draught. May it serve you well.

npcs.name: Wandering Merchant
npcs.greeting: Psst! Looking for supplies? I've got what you need...

dialogue.response: Potions, runes, and more! But everything costs mana crystals.
A wise purchase. This will restore 30 HP when you need it most.
An excellent rune of frost. Take it to the forge and see what you can create.
